This comes as the death toll from Israel’s genocidal war on Gaza has risen to 73,074 Palestinians, with another 173,537 people wounded, according to Wafa news agency, citing medical sources in the Gaza Strip. articles.title: Iran warns ‘forceful response’ to ships failing to comply with approved Hormuz routes
articles.summary: Iran warns ‘forceful response’ to ships failing to comply with approved Hormuz routes Iran’s joint military command has warned ships moving through the Strait of Hormuz to use its approved routes or face a “forceful response”. “Any failure to comply, deviation from the designated route, or disregard for the navigation protocols of the Islamic Republic of Iran in the Strait of Hormuz will be met with an immediate and forceful response from the armed forces,” it said in a statement carried by Iranian state TV on Thursday.

articles.summary: Over 20 million expected in Tehran for Ali Khamenei's funeral More than 20 million people are reportedly expected to travel to Iran’s capital for the funeral of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, who was assassinated by the US and Israel on 28 February, according to Iranian state TV.
